items.title: Japan on high alert for 'huge' second quake after issuing tsunami warning

items.title: Are insider traders making millions from the Iran war?
items.dek: The BBC has found significant spikes in activity shortly before the US president made some announcements.

items.title: Iranian woman arrested in US for allegedly trafficking arms to Sudan
items.dek: Shamim Mafi is accused of brokering the sales of arms to Sudan's defence ministry on behalf of Iran.
